author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for adding 5 missing LSP operations (workspaceSymbol, goToImplementation, prepareCallHierarchy, incomingCalls, outgoingCalls) — parity with CC LSPTool.ts:62-73. Not addressable in a cleanup pass: depends on #636 LSP server pool. Five distinct operation handlers in the LSPTool. Multi-day feature. Parent audit #523.
